programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD is threatening to steal the King of Fuzugs treasure Inspector Gadgets mission is to save the treasure from Dr Claw

programme.title: Arizona Days

programme.title: Lawmen
programme.desc: While celebrating in an inebriated state a group of cattlemen inadvertently kill an old man in Bannock The righteous marshal of the town vows to punish them

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A football game against Dr Wilys robot masters brings acquaintances of Kevin from high school to Videoland The N team ought to play good and win because the prize is the throne of Videoland

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claws henchman tries to take Gadgets watch

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Hong 105
programme.desc: Hong 105

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Greg will lie about anything to get a date with a hot girl but when she ends up being everything he has already lied about he must die Then her roommate wants to get ahead at work so is introduced her to a beauty czar who makes her exquisitely lovely which spells her downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Three pledges for a fraternity on probation run by a soft-spoken leader and his 2 sidekicks are visited by a beautiful young sorority gal whos looking for a frat to pledge her own sorority ends up tagging along with the pledges to an abandoned house where an urban legend murder took place years before Led by the obnoxious pledge master the trio of pledges must enter the house and pass each test given to them The question is ; will they survive

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The various unlucky owners of a strange bag of cocaine are followed over the course of a night

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Successful romance novelist Claudia returns to her small hometown of Bolton to attend her high school reunion Claudia gets involved in a steamy affair with handsome young resident stud Lance However trouble materializes in the form of jealous and sinister ex-boyfriend turned local sheriff Lee

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While passing through a small town Eric is shot and buried by a deranged cop-wannabe who is murdering vagrants while impersonating a police officer Alamo Joe catches up to Eric and Eric convinces him that the phony cop is a serial killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes into a town looking for Skorzany after hearing about several murders by a skinwalker He learns from a Native American medicine man that there may be a cure In the end Eric finds out that the cure was a lie and he moves on

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: An actress complicates an investigation when she tries to play detective in a real life case

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan travel to a seaside village to retrieve a cursed foghorn that is being used by a town resident to summon the ghost of a vengeful pirate

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: The 73 Crews heart-sick Japanese friend Fuji must get a letter to his best girl back home in Japan But a secret mission to mail the letter from a Japanese-held island becomes complicated when Fujis letter gets mixed up in Binghamtons plan to distribute propaganda leaflets to the enemy

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers grandpa offers pointers on drilling a platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers conned into signing a contract for dancing lessons

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When some of Little Lukes classmates tease and bully him about his hillbilly roots Grandpa steps in to teach them about the perniciousness of prejudice

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When some of Little Lukes classmates tease and bully him about his hillbilly roots Grandpa steps in to teach them about the perniciousness of prejudice

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is assigned to protect the winner of the Miss USA contest

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: An Arabian prince is protected by Max and an Israeli agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed wins 100 in Wilburs name when he correctly answers a contest question over the telephone Wilbur now has a chance to win 5000 but hes going to need Eds help

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Carol head out to Pine Lake Lodge for a little rest and relaxation leaving Ed at home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Sergeant Schultz impersonates Klink in a scheme to get some of his men free from the Gestapo

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: To get an Italian officer to defect the Heroes use pizza to tempt him

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Tinker is arrested for the theft of Binghamtons printing press and The Captain taps Parker to be Tinkers Defense Counsel in a trial which Binghamton himself will preside over Parker and McHale must then stall the proceedings while Gruber and The Crew execute a plan to get Tinker off the hook with a bit of creative evidence-tampering

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain head to an island in the Pacific Ocean where MAD plan to explode an underwater bomb

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.title: Love Boat 124
programme.desc: Love Boat 124

programme.title: WKRP 117
programme.desc: WKRP 117

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelon Commonality is invaded and psychic Katya Petrenko is the prime suspect She tells Boone she knows about his secret activities and needs him

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood team consults with noted linguist Adrian Bouchard Cedric Smith to decipher the aliens transmissions

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Rowan who claims that she and Will were married in a previous life before she was burned as a witch finds herself accused of murder Can she find her true self before the angry mob takes the law into their own hands

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When one of Dr Arcanes experiments is inexplicably ruined Graham suspects poltergeists Arcane swiftly discovers the spirit of General Sunderland is haunting the swamp and has plans for revenge

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The tall and imposing Magus arrives on board the ship He claims godlike powers namely that he effected the Creation But he is now disillusioned with the way that Life has progressed and wishes to start again He plans to mate Helena and Tony and Maya with Koenig But of course he is not God but a renegade cosmic sorcerer and quite illogical at that who needs to be controlled

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: From the town of Sandhill Victoria along with an alcoholic and cynical hunter search the desert for an Indian brave infected with measles The Indian does not believe the White Mans medicine can save him-only the Medicine Man at the camp of his father the Chief The disease could wipe out the entire tribe

programme.title: Chey 510
programme.desc: Chey 510

programme.title: Young 310
programme.desc: Young 310

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone is assigned to partner on a cat burglary case with an inspector he has become romantically involved with and even proposed to But when a woman is apparently murdered by the burglar Stones relationship with his new partner is strained as he believes the burglar is the killer and she does not believe the murder fits the burglars pattern

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The exact rendering of a map is duplicated in order to fool a female spy Its the second part of an overlay that details NATOs missile defense system

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gannon and Friday visit a self-described guru who advocates mind-expansion through drugs Brother William is suspected of giving or selling LSD to minors The detectives debate their ideas of drug use with the suspect

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are asked by a woman from Oregon to try to find her niece who has run away from home Their search eventually leads them into the world of pornography and they soon become involved in the arrest of a pornographer who may have info on where she might be located

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is deputized to transport a suspected killer of a man and his wife to the county seat along with witnesses who want to lynch the prisoner

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A political candidate for Governor bases much of his campaign on libelling the Barkley family

programme.title: What to See and Do
programme.desc: Oyster City Brewing Company Apalachicola Grayton Beach Has Kept The Title Nice Dogs Strange People andamp;#124; 30A Misfits"

programme.title: Music Scene
programme.desc: Broken String Guitar is a true-to-life reflection that, as we get older, we start to realize that the dreams of where we wanted to be, and where we ended up, so"

programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Motorcycle Adventures Ep 015

programme.title: Lets Go Thailand Motorcycles Mr Cartoon Ep 005
programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Motorcycles Mr Cartoon Ep 005

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Ron Levin a wealthy businessman has disappeared No body is found but there was a list with instructions in his house - a recipe for murder Its author Joe Hunt is the defendant The successful young business man had formed a team of prestigious former fellow students for a risky project which should make them all rich His partners claim they didnt know about the means

programme.title: 315 the Moment of Truth
programme.desc: The Cobras a vicious street gang rule an embattled high school with their violent brand of terror But theyre headed for a showdown when an ex-gang-member-gone-good challenges their brutal reign

programme.title: Tiger Warsaw
programme.desc: Chuck brought sorrow to his family when he shot his father who is now a semi-invalid After 15 years of self destruction he returns home to seek forgiveness

programme.title: Badge of the Assassin
programme.desc: Three black revolutionaries gun down two New York City police officers The subsequent investigation puts a white assistant DA and a black police detective on the trail of the killers that leads from New York to San Francisco and down to New Orleans

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: Night of the Demons
programme.desc: Night of the Demons is a 1988 American supernatural horror film directed by Kevin S Tenney written and produced by Joe Augustyn and starring Amelia Kinkade Cathy Podewell Linnea Quigley Hal Havins and Alvin Alexis

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Darcizzle
programme.desc: Boyfriend Confronts Reckless Man Killing Big Breeder Fish RIVER MONSTERS! Epic Bridge Battles with Huge Predator Fish (South Florida) Searching for EDIBLE SHARK"

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss invents a thermal ray which dangerously overheats the Prides engines forcing the Lightning League to land on Sandeen in search of amethysts a cooling gem which can protect the engines This is Saw Boss plan A prisoner Antar escapes

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss is capturing all the scientists of a Brain Trust by luring them with a false message from Audric to his radiation surrounded base Jayce stumbles upon the plan and smuggles himself Flora Gillian Oon and the vehicles onto the base

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Mayhem is obsessed with finding Caesars sword beneath the catacombs of Rome as it is supposed to make him invincible

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A millionaire has hired VENOM to steal a machine that can cause ultra sonic vibrations The millionaire wants to become vice president of the Netherlands and if his demands are not met he will destroy all of Hollands dykes He only wanted to bluff -- too bad Mayhem never bluffs

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A warp zone that only opens every 1000 video years is the gateway for King Charles who wants to go home But his final decision is send Gameboy at his place The supercomputer Gameboy turns out to be a lot of trouble for the N team But things get worse when Mother Brain gets Gameboy and and Dr Wily turns him into Game Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and the N Team are off to Hyrule to meet Kevins favorite game hero Link and Princess Zelda Mother Brain gives the Potion of Power to Gannon that restores an evil wizard to his rightful form

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger uses a time portal to change Earths history The team must stop him or they themselves may cease to exist

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids meet Lorn - an orphan boy with a magic talisman - and invite him to join the team But Lorns talisman is more dangerous than any of them realizes
